decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: A second call to process with the SAME idempotency_key does NOT charge again — it returns the result stored from the first call. A new idempotency_key charges exactly once.
The change modifies only the payments module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It checks _results for the idempotency_key before charging and records the result under that key, so the de-duplication persists across calls.
